title: Memcached Connection Count Versus maxconn
spl:
index=cache sourcetype="memcached:stats"
| eval conn_pct=if(max_connections>0, round(100*curr_connections/max_connections,1), null())
| where conn_pct > 80
| timechart span=5m max(conn_pct) as used_pct by host
description: Approaching `max_connections` risks refused sockets even when memory is healthy.
value: Prevents connection storms from taking down shared caches.
implementation: Some builds omit `max_connections`‚ÄĒderive from config via lookup if needed.
visualization: Gauge, line chart, alert when >80% for 15m.
detailedImplementation:
Prerequisites
‚ÄĘ Install and configure the required add-on or app: Custom scripted input.
‚ÄĘ Ensure the following data sources are available: `index=cache` `sourcetype=memcached:stats` (`curr_connections`, `max_connections`).
‚ÄĘ For app installation, inputs.conf, and Splunk directory layout, see the Implementation guide: docs/implementation-guide.md

Step 1 ‚ÄĒ Configure data collection
Confirm `STAT curr_connections` maps to numeric fields.

Step 2 ‚ÄĒ Create the search and alert
Run the following SPL in Search (then save as report or alert; adjust time range and threshold as needed):

```spl
index=cache sourcetype="memcached:stats"
| eval conn_pct=if(max_connections>0, round(100*curr_connections/max_connections,1), null())
| where conn_pct > 80
| timechart span=5m max(conn_pct) as used_pct by host
```

Understanding this SPL

**Memcached Connection Count Versus maxconn** ‚ÄĒ See the description and value fields in this use case JSON.

Documented **Data sources**: `index=cache` `sourcetype=memcached:stats` (`curr_connections`, `max_connections`). **App/TA**: Custom scripted input. Rename `index=` / `sourcetype=` to match your deployment.

**Pipeline walkthrough**

‚ÄĘ Scope to the documented index and sourcetype, then apply transforms, thresholds, and `timechart`/`stats` as in the SPL above.

Step 3 ‚ÄĒ Validate
Confirm events exist, field extractions match your format, and thresholds reflect production baselines.

Step 4 ‚ÄĒ Operationalize
Add to a dashboard or alert; document ownership. Suggested visuals: Gauge, line chart, alert when >80% for 15m..
grandmaExplanation: We watch how many clients talk to your cache at once so you do not hit the connection ceiling.
